title: Search function
excerpt:
Starting this week, when searching there only appears results found within the ‘Item’ column, where as ususally the ‘Search’ function searches within all columns.

posts.author: thuek (Thue Kristensen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Starting this week, when searching there only appears results found within the ‘Item’ column, where as ususally the ‘Search’ function searches within all columns.

How do I get this feature back to allow me to use the ‘Search’ function to search within all columns?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @thuek,

When clicking into the search tool, you should have the option to customise which columns to include in the search:

Screen Shot 2023-06-06 at 1.52.46 pm592×712 47 KB

Is this the same on your end?
